title: Better end rods
description: This texture will remove that annoying tip from your End Rods, turning them into a smooth line of light that will make your builds look much better.
body:
This texture will remove that annoying tip from your End Rods, turning them into a smooth line of light that will make your builds look much better.


![In the image, you can see how it looks in-game (shaders were used in the screenshot).](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a6d8b7cad1a2b6b23e3cb285ef815f65e1038b7_0.webp)
